function.content:
---
record_type: bill
bill_id: bill.window_farm_starter_tray
alias: window_farm_starter_tray
purchased_on: 2026-04-09
total_eur: 27
counterparty: Grünzeug Gärtnerei Wien
project: Window Farm Notes
related_entity: Oskar Novak
lines:
  - item: self-watering tray
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 19
    line_eur: 19
  - item: herb seed packets
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 8
    line_eur: 8
---
# Herb tray and seed starter order

```text
+----------------+-------------------------------+
| field          | value                         |
+----------------+-------------------------------+
| record_type    | bill                          |
| bill_id        | bill.window_farm_starter_tray |
| alias          | window_farm_starter_tray      |
| purchased_on   | 2026-04-09                    |
| total_eur      | 27                            |
| counterparty   | Grünzeug Gärtnerei Wien       |
| project        | Window Farm Notes             |
| related_entity | Oskar Novak                   |
+----------------+-------------------------------+
```

## Line Items

```text
+---+--------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| # | item               | qty | unit_eur | line_eur |
+---+--------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| 1 | self-watering tray | 1   | 19       | 19       |
| 2 | herb seed packets  | 1   | 8        | 8        |
+---+--------------------+-----+----------+----------+
|   | TOTAL              |     |          | 27       |
+---+--------------------+-----+----------+----------+
```

## Notes

Small child-friendly garden experiment that matters mostly because it might stick as a care routine.

function.message: Completed the next inbox task: OCR-structured Oskar’s related bill by adding schema-compliant YAML frontmatter to `50_finance/purchases/2026_04_09__eur_000027__bill__window_farm_starter_tray.md`, preserved the original note body, and deleted the processed inbox item `00_inbox/000_next-task.md`.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree, AGENTS, context), read nested AGENTS and relevant workflows/schemas before task work, preserved original file body during frontmatter migration, and deleted inbox item only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: Inbox request in `00_inbox/000_next-task.md` asked to OCR bills related to Oskar Novak. Router preflight listed one related finance file, and that file contained all required bill fields and line items. I added frontmatter per `99_system/schemas/finance-record-frontmatter.md`, kept body content intact per migration workflow, then removed the inbox file per inbox-processing workflow.
